rationale: CI infrastructure: moving JRuby testing from Travis to Evergreen. No driver behavior or spec involvement.
Improvement to NoServerAvailable error message content; UX/diagnostics improvement, no spec rule violated.
CI infrastructure: adding JUnit XML test reports to Evergreen. No driver behavior or spec involvement.
Adding Ruby 2.2 to toolchain. Build/packaging, no spec involvement.
Resync SDAM test corpus to add mixed case hostnames; depends on SPEC-915. Test data update.
Adding replica set and sharded cluster testing to Travis CI. CI configuration, no spec involvement.
max_staleness seconds/milliseconds unit mismatch in staleness calculation; server-selection spec defines exact formula violated here.
SDAM spec quoted: driver must remove seed not in primary's host list; Ruby retains it while Python correctly removes it.
SDAM spec defines ReplicaSetNoPrimary and ReplicaSetWithPrimary as distinct topologies; driver conflates them into one.
C compile warnings in BSON native extension; build quality issue, no spec behavior involved.
OperationError#code nil on duplicate key; Ruby API issue, no spec rule mandates error code exposure for this case.
Options::Mapper passes through unknown options instead of discarding; forward-compat improvement, no spec rule violated.
Tutorial documentation reorganization; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Internal refactor: reclassifying retry_writes as a CRUD option to avoid unnecessary cluster creation. No spec rule violated.
Test suite infrastructure: separate test user creation. No driver behavior or spec involvement.
Change stream tutorial documentation duplication fix. Docs only.
Adding change stream docs for database/cluster-level usage. Documentation improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Global client registry in test suite to manage background threads during SDAM tests. Test infrastructure only.
SDAM monitoring spec defines ServerHeartbeatStartedEvent/SucceededEvent/FailedEvent; driver does not implement them at all.
Adding command monitoring logging example to tutorial. Documentation only.
Gemspec upper bound version constraint update for mongo_kerberos. Packaging/dependency, no spec behavior.
Enabling SNI on JRuby where possible. TLS implementation improvement; no specific spec rule about SNI requirement.
Fix concurrent array modification in JRuby test suite. Test infrastructure bug, no spec behavior.
Move AppMetadata class from Cluster to Server namespace. Internal refactor, no spec rule violated.
Delete Mongo::Cluster::AppMetadata BC alias. Internal cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Improve connection pool queue documentation and add invariants. Docs/internal quality, no spec rule violated.
Add auth-nossl and noauth-ssl CI configurations to Evergreen. CI configuration, no spec behavior.
Connection permanently unusable after handshake/auth exception due to premature @socket assignment. Implementation bug; no specific spec rule on recovery semantics violated.
Spec requires monitoring sockets skip SCRAM negotiation and auth; auth errors must close only non-monitoring sockets. Driver violated these rules.
Leaking client instances in collections_spec test. Test cleanup issue, no spec behavior involved.
Skip scheduling exhausted cursors (cursor_id=0) for finalization. Internal optimization, no spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-571; improvement to bump wire protocol version for 4.2. Proactive spec-rollout work, not a nonconformance bug.
Depends on DRIVERS-430; adding test to verify killCursors succeeds. Test infrastructure update.
Depends on DRIVERS-429; spec defines handling of network errors/timeouts during handshake; driver needed to change its behavior per spec commit.
SDAM monitoring spec requires ServerDescriptionChanged event when server transitions to unknown; driver omits the primary-to-unknown event.
Depends on DRIVERS-465/SPEC-1040; Kerberos hostname canonicalization algorithm updated per spec. Driver used outdated algorithm.
Topology closed SDAM event defined in spec but never published by driver; also missing log subscriber.
Adding SDAM monitoring tutorial example with code and output. Documentation only.
IPv4 fallback when IPv6 unavailable. Network connection behavior; no spec rule about IPv4/IPv6 fallback order.
Non-monitoring connection incorrectly inspects server features for auth mechanism instead of using its own ismaster response per spec.
Create topology base class as internal refactor to enable SDAM spec compliance in RUBY-1442. Structural refactor, not a direct spec fix.
Server selection spec requires random selection within staleness window; driver selects first server instead.
Client monitoring event subscriptions incorrectly shared/not-inherited on dup/with. Internal implementation issue, no specific spec rule.
Refactor address storage from topology to cluster for diagnostics and spec compliance. Internal architectural change.
Move SDAM logic from event handler classes to cluster for encapsulation. Internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Document monitoring option on Client and Monitoring classes. Documentation improvement only.
Add ability to wait for background threads to terminate. Test infrastructure improvement for SDAM tests; no spec behavior.
SDAM monitoring spec specifies when events are published; heartbeat events incorrectly published even when monitoring is disabled.
Test sdam_proc interaction with with/dup/clone. Test infrastructure only; no driver behavior or spec rule.
SDAM spec requires checkIfHasPrimary on me mismatch; driver missing this and other required invocations per spec audit.
